nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹈形目
nodes.summary: 鹈形目（Pelecaniformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联93种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等93种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹮科
nodes.summary: 鹮科（Threskiornithidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联30种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等30种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Malagasy sacred ibis
nodes.summary: Malagasy sacred ibis（Malagasy sacred ibis，学名 Threskiornis bernieri），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹮科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动、污染。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Madagascan population has been markedly declining mainly through unsustainable harvesting of eggs, nest site disturbance and wetland habitat degradation. Human interference and habitat loss also pose threats to the abbotti race.Byers O, Brouwer K, Coulter M, Seal US

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Madagascan population has been markedly declining mainly through unsustainable harvesting of eggs, nest site disturbance and wetland habitat degradation. Human interference and habitat loss also pose threats to the abbotti race.Byers O, Brouwer K, Coulter M, Seal US

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Important areas of this species' habitat are threatened with pollution, sedimentation and encroachment of alluvial sands

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Malagasy sacred ibis 属于目 鹈形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Malagasy sacred ibis 属于科 鹮科。
